one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: finalization of Coast Tsimshian RTI Holdings Limited Partnership accounting for 2020 fiscal year resulted in additional revenue of $19,726,027 from Lax Kw'alaams Business Development Limited Partnership reported in comparative figures
economic_notes: Band has partnership interests in limited partnerships, membership in three societies, and shareholdings in ten companies. Key investments include Coast Tsimshian Resources Limited Partnership, Lax Kw'alaams Fishing Enterprises Limited Partnership, Lax Kw'alaams (MV Nucleus) LLP, Lax Kw'alaams Business Development LP, and Lax Kw'alaams Holdings LP. Contingent liabilities include guarantor of member mortgages up to $458,334, ferry corporation letter of credit $1,000,000, and guarantor on Bank of Montreal operating line for Coast Tsimshian Fish Plant Ltd. up to $1,800,000.
notes: Interfund administration and rent charges of $2,110,813 not eliminated for consolidation. Investments accounted for using modified equity method. Prior period adjustment of $19,726,027 added to 2020 comparative figures for investments and equity in investments. Investment loss of $1,262,083 in 2021 vs gain of $18,841,606 in 2020. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + BC Housing + DFO + FNHA + Province of BC = $24,696,412. No schedule of remuneration provided. Community Project Funds expenditure $5,918,641 and Capital Development $963,267 also reported.
